Reviewer for ICRA, IROS, ..."}];export const ABOUT_TEXT="

I am a fourth-year Ph.D. candidate in the Department of Automation at Tsinghua University, supervised by Prof. Xiang Li. I earned my bachelor's degree in Automation from the School of Astronautics, Harbin Institute of Technology, where I was part of the HIT Robotics Team (HITCRT) and won the national third place in the Robocon 2020. In December 2024, I was a visiting student in Prof. Haoyong Yu's research group at the National University of Singapore. From 12/2025 to 06/2026, I will be a visiting student in the Personal Robotics Lab (PRL) at Imperial College London, under the supervision of Prof. Yiannis Demiris.

My research primarily focuses on the development of safe, efficient, and user-friendly human-robot collaborative systems. My interests include:

  • Lower-Limb Exoskeleton Assist with different wearers and tasks
  • Upper-Limb Exoskeleton Personalized rehabilitation.
";
